clinical_meaning: Unique Subject Identifier - unique patient code in the study
Analysis Visit - visit name (e.g. WEEK 0, WEEK 8, WEEK 16)
Analysis Visit Number - numeric visit code used for chronological ordering
PUCAI - Abdominal Pain (0=no pain, 5=moderate, 10=severe)
PUCAI - Activity Level (0=no limitation, 5=occasional, 10=severe limitation)
Acute Inflammatory Cell Infiltrate - histological measure of acute inflammation (Geboes grade component)
Architectural Changes - histological measure of tissue architecture distortion (Geboes grade 0 component)
Chronic Inflammatory Infiltrate - histological measure of chronic inflammation (Geboes grade 1 component)
C-Reactive Protein - serum CRP (mg/L; systemic inflammation marker)
Crypt Destruction - histological crypt damage score (Geboes grade 4 component)
Eosinophils in Epithelium - eosinophil count in epithelial layer (Geboes grade 2a component)
Erosions or Ulcerations - histological erosion/ulceration score (Geboes grade 5 component)
Erosions or Ulcerations (RHI) - erosion/ulceration score used in Robarts Histopathology Index
Geboes Total Score - composite histological activity score for UC (sum of all 6 Geboes grades; 0=normal)
Neutrophils in Epithelium - neutrophil infiltration in epithelium (Geboes grade 3 component)
Neutrophils in Lamina Propria - neutrophil infiltration in lamina propria (Geboes grade 2b component)
Nancy Index Total Score - histological activity score for UC (0-4 scale; 0=no significant histological disease)
PUCAI - Nocturnal Stools (0=none, 10=present)
PUCAI - Number of Stools (0=0-2 stools/day, 5=3-5, 10=>5 stools/day)
Overall Histological Grade - overall histological disease activity grade
PUCAI Total Score - Pediatric Ulcerative Colitis Activity Index total (0-85; <10=remission, >=65=severe)
PUCAI - Rectal Bleeding (0=none, 5=small amount, 10=blood only)
Robarts Histopathology Index - validated histological activity score for UC (0-33; higher=more active)
PUCAI - Stool Consistency (0=formed, 5=partially formed, 10=completely liquid)
Ulcer - histological ulceration score (Geboes grade 5 component)
PUCAI - Abdominal Pain (analysis; primary reader assessment)
PUCAI - Activity Level (analysis; primary reader assessment)
Fecal Calprotectin - fecal calprotectin level (ug/g; intestinal inflammation marker)
Lactoferrin - fecal lactoferrin (ug/mL; neutrophilic intestinal inflammation marker)
PUCAI - Nocturnal Stools (analysis; primary reader assessment)
PUCAI - Number of Stools (analysis; primary reader assessment)
PUCAI Total Score (analysis) - PUCAI total as assessed by primary reader
PUCAI - Rectal Bleeding (analysis; primary reader assessment)
PUCAI - Stool Consistency (analysis; primary reader assessment)
Absolute Stool Count - absolute daily stool count from patient diary
Mayo - Endoscopy Combined Score - MES by primary reader (QUASAR alignment)
Mayo - Endoscopy Local Score - MES by local reader (QUASAR alignment)
Mayo - Endoscopy Score (0-3; 0=normal, 3=severe with spontaneous bleeding)
Full Mayo Score - complete UC clinical score (0-12; <=2=remission, >10=severe)
Modified Mayo Score - Mayo without endoscopy component (0-9)
Mayo - Physician Global Assessment Score (0-3; 0=normal, 3=severe)
Partial Mayo Score - patient-reported SF + RBS + PGS (0-9; no endoscopy)
Mayo - Rectal Bleeding Score (0-3; 0=none, 3=blood alone passed)
Mayo - Stool Frequency Score (0-3; 0=normal, 3=>5 stools/day above normal)
Chronic Inflammatory Infiltrate (analysis) - alternative chronic inflammation measure
Age - patient age at study entry (years)
Sex - patient sex (F=Female / M=Male)
Race - patient race/ethnicity (ICH E3 classification)
Country - country of investigational site
Weight at Baseline - body weight at baseline (kg)
Height at Baseline - height at baseline (cm)
BMI at Baseline - body mass index at baseline (kg/m2)
Planned Treatment Period 1 - planned treatment assignment
Actual Treatment Period 1 - treatment actually administered
Treatment Arm - randomized treatment arm assigned in the study
5-ASA Use at Baseline - 5-aminosalicylate use at baseline (Y=yes / N=no)
Prior Biologic Failure - failure of at least one prior biologic agent (Y=yes / N=no)
Clinical Response at Month 0 - corticosteroid response status at baseline
Age at Diagnosis - patient age at time of UC diagnosis (years)
Alcohol Use at Baseline - alcohol consumption status at screening
Fecal Calprotectin at Baseline - fecal calprotectin at screening (ug/g)
CRP at Baseline - serum C-Reactive Protein at screening (mg/L)
UC Disease Duration (years)
Endoscopy Score at Baseline - Mayo endoscopy subscore at screening (0-3)
Extent of Disease at Baseline - UC extent at screening colonoscopy
IMPACT-III Score at Baseline - pediatric IBD quality of life score at screening
Lactoferrin at Baseline - fecal lactoferrin at screening (ug/mL)
Mayo Score at Baseline - Full Mayo Score at screening (0-12)
Modified Mayo Score at Baseline - Modified Mayo Score at screening (0-9)
Opioid Use at Baseline - opioid medication use at screening
PUCAI Score at Baseline - Pediatric Ulcerative Colitis Activity Index at screening (0-85)
Tobacco Use at Baseline - tobacco smoking status at screening
Histology Flag 1 - histological response flag 1 derived from ADHIST
Histology Flag 2 - histological response flag 2 derived from ADHIST
Corticosteroid Use at Baseline - corticosteroid use flag at baseline
